results.rendered_html:
vi-ṣañj (√sañj) P. -ṣajati to hang on, hang to, attach,  TS. ;  Kāṭh. ;
(-ṣajjate), to be attached or devoted to,  BhP.  (pr. p. -ṣajjat, addicted to worldly objects,  ib. ; -ṣajjantī f. devoted to a man,  ib. );
to be stuck to or clung to, i.e. be followed at the heels by (instr.),  ib.
